mapper.select: SELECT employee_cd AS employeeCd, prescribed_work_date AS prescribedWorkDate, prescribed_work_count AS prescribedWorkCount, attendances_num AS attendancesNum, attendance_basic_days AS attendanceBasicDays, actual_working_hours AS actualWorkingHours, absenteeism_days AS absenteeismDays, absent_basic_days AS absentBasicDays, paid_days AS paidDays, used_paid_leave_hours AS usedPaidLeaveHours, unused_paid_leave_days AS unusedPaidLeaveDays, unused_paid_leave_hours AS unusedPaidLeaveHours, holiday_working_hours AS holidayWorkingHours, special_leave_days AS specialLeaveDays, base_salary AS baseSalary, basic_monthly_salary AS basicMonthlySalary, positional_allowance AS positionalAllowance, executive_compensation AS executiveCompensation, overtime_pay AS overtimePay, expenses_for_working_on_holidays AS expensesForWorkingOnHolidays, tax_free_com_expenses AS taxFreeComExpenses, tax_com_expenses AS taxComExpenses, income_tax AS incomeTax, income_tax_cumulative AS incomeTaxCumulative, resident_tax AS residentTax, tax_payment_cumulative AS taxPaymentCumulative, tax_table AS taxTable, welfare_pension_fund AS welfarePensionFund, emp_pension_ins AS empPensionIns, welfare_pension_standard_remuneration AS welfarePensionStandardRemuneration, social_ins_total AS socialInsTotal, social_insurance_premium_calculation AS socialInsurancePremiumCalculation, social_insurance_premium_adjustment AS socialInsurancePremiumAdjustment, social_insurance_premium_after_deduction AS socialInsurancePremiumAfterDeduction, emp_ins_fee AS empInsFee, health_ins_fee AS healthInsFee, health_insurance_standard_remuneration AS healthInsuranceStandardRemuneration, nurs_care_ins_fee AS nursCareInsFee, year_end_adjustment_withholding AS yearEndAdjustmentWithholding, year_end_adjustment_refund AS yearEndAdjustmentRefund, deduction_total AS deductionTotal, net_payment_total AS netPaymentTotal, number_of_dependents AS numberOfDependents FROM t_monthly_payroll_statement_detail WHERE aggregate_period = #{yearMonth} ;
SELECT Max(print_implementation_num) FROM t_monthly_payroll_statement WHERE aggregate_period = #{yearMonth} ;
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_monthly_payroll_statement ( print_implementation_num, aggregate_period, create_date, delete_flg, insert_date, insert_user_cd, update_date, update_user_cd )VALUES( #{maxPrint}, #{yearMonth}, #{today}, 0, now(), 'testUser01', null, null ) ON CONFLICT (print_implementation_num, aggregate_period) DO UPDATE SET update_date = now(), update_user_cd = EXCLUDED.insert_user_cd ;
